Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to respond as the LLM target analyze anomalies propose hypotheses and propose SQL queries to investigate

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Provide analysis of each case check order of events not matching normal flow Identify where activities out of order missing steps incorrect resource roles payment before shipment or invoice

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Provide hypotheses system errors process bypass training prioritization fraud

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Then propose SQL queries e g find cases where activity order deviates where credit check after shipment where payment before invoice where shipment scheduled N but shipped etc

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Use window functions LAG LEAD self joins Also join orders and resources to check role department mismatches

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Make sure to reference tables correctly

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We will output structured answer sections Anomalies Identified Hypotheses Investigative SQL Queries
